recommendations.title: Metallica and San Francisco Symphony: S&M2
recommendations.overview: S&M2, the live concert film from Metallica and the San Francisco Symphony is the concert event of the year!  S&M2 features 20 songs from the two-night event that opened San Francisco’s new Chase Center, with many Metallica fan favourites and two uniq

recommendations.title: The Narrow Margin
recommendations.overview: A tough cop meets his match when he has to guard a gangster's widow on a train journey from Chicago to Los Angeles.

recommendations.title: Drowning Mona
recommendations.overview: A Sheriff investigating the murder of an upstate New York woman learns that her extremely hateful ways gave the whole town a motive to be rid of her.

recommendations.title: The Exorcism
recommendations.overview: A troubled actor begins to unravel while shooting a supernatural horror film, leading his estranged daughter to wonder if he's slipping back into his past addictions or if there's something more sinister at play.

recommendations.title: London Calling
recommendations.overview: After fleeing the UK from a job gone wrong, a down on his luck hitman is forced to babysit the son of his new crime boss and show him how to become a man.

recommendations.title: Class of 1984
recommendations.overview: Andy is a new teacher at an inner city high school that is unlike any he has seen before. There are metal detectors at the front door and the place is basically run by a tough kid named Peter Stegman. Soon, Andy and Stegman become enemies and Stegman

recommendations.title: Dad Wanted
recommendations.overview: What does a thrill-seeker tween girl do when her mom forbids her to enter a BMX race? Cast an actor with nothing to lose to play her approving dad.

recommendations.title: Foul Play
recommendations.overview: A shy San Francisco librarian and a bumbling cop fall in love as they solve a crime involving albinos, dwarves, and the Catholic Church.

recommendations.title: Boarding Gate
recommendations.overview: A beautiful woman, Sandra, seduces a wealthy businessman, Miles Rennburg. Little does he realise that she has been sent to kill him at the behest of her boyfriend/crime partner, Lester. Controlling all this is Sue, Lester's wife.

recommendations.title: The Glass Key
recommendations.overview: A crooked politician finds himself being accused of murder by a gangster from whom he refused help during a re-election campaign.
